backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing CRUD operations for products (crystals, bracelets, pendulums) and services with filtering by type/trending status, using Map storage and migration support.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old product schema (crystal/bracelet only) to new schema adding pendulum type, isTrending field, and services/nextServiceId state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three high-confidence features for integrating external Mystic Moon content, products/services, and unified branding across the application.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of 15 frontend files covering React components, data files, utilities, and configuration for the Mystic Moon with Ishita spiritual services website.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining mystical theme variables (purple, rose, gold, cream) for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags and page title for "Mystic Moon with Ishita - Spiritual Wisdom & Healing" website.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component rendering the complete single-page layout with Hero, About, Services, Reviews, ProductCatalog, and Footer sections in a gradient background.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section showcasing Ishita's 4 years of tarot reading experience, intuitive healing abilities, and crystal expertise with mystical card styling and healer portrait.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with business info, services/shop lists, Instagram link, copyright for MysticMoonWithIshita.com, and caffeine.ai attribution in three-column responsive layout.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section component with animated gradient backgrounds, sparkle icons, and call-to-action buttons for services and products.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Product card component displaying crystal/bracelet/pendulum items with image, type badge, description, and calculated final price.
frontend/src/components/ProductCatalog.t: Product catalog with tabbed filtering (all/crystal/bracelet/pendulum) that displays products in a responsive grid layout.
frontend/src/components/Reviews.tsx: Reviews section displaying client testimonials in cards with star ratings, scrollable text, and category badges.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Services section that fetches and displays spiritual services from backend actor with loading skeletons and icon decorations.
frontend/src/data/products.ts: Static product data array containing 15+ crystals, bracelets, and pendulums with descriptions, types, base prices, and image URLs.
frontend/src/data/reviews.ts: Static reviews data array containing 15+ client testimonials with names, text, dates, and categories (Tarot/Crystal).
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor using Internet Identity authentication, automatically invalidating and refetching dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for fetching and mutating products and services data, including CRUD operations for products (add, update, delete) and filtering by type or trending status.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom mystical color palette (purple, rose, gold, cream) in OKLCH format, supporting light/dark modes and importing Cinzel and Cormorant Garamond fonts for elegant typography.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/pricing.ts: Utility functions for calculating product prices (base price + ₹400 markup) and formatting prices in Indian Rupees with proper locale formatting.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the theme with custom OKLCH color system, mystical color palette, container settings, animations, and plugins for typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing Mystic Moon website features including tarot reading services, crystal shop with ₹900+ pricing, Instagram integration, 35 customer reviews, and professional product gallery.
